steps.t: You were able to obtain a Warg's pelt. Duindil should find this useful in the investigation. Duindil can be found in Echad Terthas outside of Caras Ge…
Rhovandis can be found in Idhobel, located in Western Eregion and north-east of Echad Terthas. Duindil has asked you to deliver the Warg's pelt to Rho…
